title: File upload endpoint intermittently returning 500 for enterprise tier
summary: File upload endpoint intermittently returning 500 for enterprise tier
description: Enterprise customers on the new billing tier are seeing intermittent 500 errors when uploading attachments larger than 10MB. Confirmed via server logs — happens roughly 1 in 20 requests during peak load. Needs urgent triage.
raw_text: File upload endpoint intermittently returning 500 for enterprise tier. Enterprise customers seeing intermittent 500 errors when uploading attachments larger than 10MB.

title: Dashboard loading times exceeding 10 seconds for enterprise accounts
summary: Dashboard loading times exceeding 10 seconds for enterprise accounts
description: Multiple enterprise customers reporting that the main dashboard takes 10+ seconds to load. Affects accounts with more than 500 users. Likely a missing index or N+1 query issue.
raw_text: Dashboard loading times exceeding 10 seconds for enterprise accounts. Affects accounts with more than 500 users.

title: Add pagination to task history API
summary: Add pagination to task history API
description: The /api/tasks/history endpoint returns the full history with no pagination, causing slow responses for accounts with long histories.
raw_text: Add pagination to task history API. The history endpoint returns the full history with no pagination, causing slow responses.

title: Investigate slow query on analytics dashboard load
summary: Investigate slow query on analytics dashboard load
description: Analytics dashboard takes 8-12s to load for accounts with more than 5000 tasks. Likely missing index on the tasks table.
raw_text: Investigate slow query on analytics dashboard load. Analytics dashboard takes 8-12s to load for accounts with more than 5000 tasks. Likely missing index on the tasks table.
